title: Generate complete core flow test cases from a valid requirement
steps: Provide a clear requirement with actors, actions, and expected outcomes
expected_result: System returns comprehensive test cases that map correctly to core business flows in the requirement.

title: Prioritize critical business logic scenarios first
steps: Submit a requirement containing both critical and non-critical behaviors
Inspect ordering of generated test cases
expected_result: Critical business logic cases are listed first and marked as High priority.

title: Include negative validation scenarios for invalid inputs
steps: Submit a requirement with explicit input constraints
expected_result: Output includes negative cases for invalid, missing, and malformed inputs relevant to the requirement.

title: Cover boundary values around defined limits
steps: Submit a requirement that includes numeric or length boundaries
Verify presence of min-1, min, max, and max+1 style coverage
expected_result: Boundary and off-by-one cases are generated correctly for all explicit limits.

title: Handle duplicate request race to prevent duplicate outcomes
steps: Trigger the same business action twice in rapid succession in the generated scenario context
Execute or simulate both requests concurrently
expected_result: Only one valid outcome is committed; duplicate processing is rejected or idempotently handled.

title: Gracefully handle downstream service timeout during critical flow
steps: Use a requirement that depends on an external service
Simulate service timeout during execution path
expected_result: Generated tests include timeout handling with user-safe failure behavior, retries, or rollback expectations.

title: Reject empty or whitespace-only requirement input
expected_result: System rejects both inputs with clear validation feedback and no test case generation.

title: Generate edge cases for special characters and Unicode content
steps: Provide a requirement containing symbols, accented characters, and emoji
expected_result: Output preserves character integrity and includes realistic edge scenarios for special/unicode input handling.

title: Detect and address contradictory requirement statements
steps: Provide a requirement with conflicting rules
expected_result: Generated tests explicitly cover contradiction handling and expected conflict resolution behavior.

title: Ensure no duplicate test cases in output
steps: Submit a requirement containing repeated acceptance criteria
Compare case titles and intents for duplication
expected_result: Output contains unique, non-duplicated test cases only.

title: Maintain stable output format under large requirement input
steps: Provide a very large multi-section requirement near supported maximum size
expected_result: System returns valid, well-structured test cases without truncation-related corruption.

title: Recover safely when user interrupts generation session
steps: Start generation for a complex requirement
expected_result: System recovers gracefully without partial corruption, and allows safe retry/resume.
